01 / ABOUT

EST. 2019 · RIYADH

Who we are

Saudi Arabia's first GACA-certified Drone- as-a-Service operator.

Artrabia is a Drone-as-a-Service company established in Riyadh in 2019
— the first Saudi operator to acquire GACA (General Authority of Civil
Aviation) certification. Every pilot on our roster is GACA Part 107
certified.

We deliver multi-format aerial footage and high-resolution stills,
photogrammetry, consultancy, training, site surveys and inspections —
built on our founder’s experience as a fighter jet pilot in the RSAF and
Artrabia Publishing, a fine-art imprint producing high-quality images,
filming and art books since 2005.

To date we’ve supported Saudi Aramco, the General Entertainment
Authority, the Public Investment Fund, The Red Sea Global Development
Company and NEOM — focused on safe, reliable, accurate data,
professionally delivered.

Flexible

Trustworthy

Innovative

Founded by a retired Royal Saudi Air Force F-15 instructor pilot, Artrabia pairs two decades of aviation discipline with a publishing-grade eye — turning the sky into actionable data, footage and 3D reality.

Vision

Going beyond the horizon.

Be the #1 drone services provider in the region.

Mission

Bring the sky closer to our partners.

Tools and data for sound decisions, efficiency and cost-
cutting.

Why us

Data accuracy. Personnel safety. Cost- effectiveness.

Industrial-grade UAVs · Born & bred in Saudi Arabia.

02 / SERVICES

SIX CORE CAPABILITIES

What we do

Precision Mapping, Inspection & Aerial Intelligence for Critical Projects.

Customised drone data solutions across cinematography, mapping, construction, energy and inspection — each delivered by certified pilots with industrial-grade equipment.–

S/00

Mining & Infrastructure

Pre-construction surveys plus inspection of solar installations, buildings, roofs, chimneys, towers and wind turbines.
MULTI-SECTOR
S/01

Solar PV Inspection

Thermal & visual scans pinpoint failed photovoltaic cells across entire solar parks — days of manual work in a single flight.
THERMAL · VISUAL
S/02

Oil & Gas Inspection

Flare stacks, oil rigs and pipeline monitoring — leaks, corrosion, heat spots and gas emissions detected without human exposure.
SAFETY · COMPLIANCE
S/03

Construction Progress & 360°Tours

Repeatable weekly flights, consistent angles, virtual site tours — drive productivity and reduce remote-site travel.
See Progress. Make Better Decisions
S/04

Photogrammetry & 3D Modelling

Orthophoto, DSM, DTM, 2D & 3D models, contour models — accurate to 3 cm/px when paired with ground control points.
Precision From Above
S/05

Aerial Photography &Videography

8K Ultra HD cinematography from custom rigs — birds-eye views, dramatic 360° panoramas and uncut sequences from interior to 400 ft.
UP TO 8K

05 / BEYOND DAAS

CUSTOM & CAPABILITY-BUILDING

Consultations & Training

We don't just fly. We programme build the with you.

We work alongside national champions, mega-projects and the world’s leading architectural visualisation studios — supplying primary source aerial data.

Consultations & Training

Bespoke drone solutions, engineered for your operation.

Off-the-shelf rarely fits. We design feasible, scalable and cost-efficient drone workflows around your specific bottlenecks — with end-user support that lifts bottom-line efficiency.

  • Custom payload integration & sensor selection
  • Workflow design + on-site implementation
  • Ground & aerial AI detection (workforce, traffic, asset count)
EXPLORE CUSTOM
Training & development

Stand up your own UAV department.

For corporations and government entities ready to bring drone capability in-house — covering theory, simulator, real-world flight, and GACA Part 107 commercial certification.

  • Theoretical syllabus — safe, effective operations
  • Simulator + real-world practical training
  • GACA Part 107 commercial certification prep
EXPLORE TRAINING

06 / APPROVALS

REGULATORY & COMPLIANCE

Regulatory & compliance

Hassle-Free drone Permit Approvals

Many drone projects stall before takeoff — caught in permits and compliance. We’ve built proven workflows to secure operational approvals efficiently, removing the uncertainty so you can focus on outcomes, not paperwork.

01

Scope & Risk Assessment

Site, airspace and mission profile reviewed; hazards and no-fly constraints mapped up front.

SITE SURVEY · AIRSPACE

02

Permits & GACA Approval

We prepare and file all documentation — operational authorisations secured through established channels.

PART 107 · AUTHORISATIONS

03

Flight Planning & NOTAM

Routes, altitudes and crew briefed; notices and coordination with authorities issued ahead of flight.

NOTAM · CREW BRIEF

04

Execute & Deliver

Certified crews fly the mission and hand over footage, data and 3D deliverables — on schedule.

FLY · PROCESS · DELIVER
